messages.content: according to meeting minute policy it is mentioned that 2500 NPR will be given to each employee for training or field visit without having any bills . no bill will be required. 2500 includes 1000 snacks and 1500 for lodging purpose. inspite of meeting minute policy we always obtain bills for better understanding of expenses. hence its shows in bills and vouchers. rewrite

The meeting minute policy states that each employee will receive 2500 NPR for training or field visits, without the requirement of providing any bills. This amount includes 1000 NPR for snacks and 1500 NPR for lodging purposes. However, despite the policy, we always obtain bills and vouchers for a better understanding of expenses. Therefore, the expenses are documented through bills and vouchers, even though they are not required as per the meeting minute policy.
